description.en: List all board members who can sign and execute proposals in a MultiSig wallet. Board members have full voting rights and can both propose and sign actions.
description.de: Liste aller Vorstandsmitglieder, die Vorschläge in einer MultiSig-Wallet signieren und ausführen können. Vorstandsmitglieder haben volle Stimmrechte und können sowohl vorschlagen als auch Aktionen signieren.
description.es: List all board members who can sign and execute proposals in a MultiSig wallet. Board members have full voting rights and can both propose and sign actions.
description.fr: List all board members who can sign and execute proposals in a MultiSig wallet. Board members have full voting rights and can both propose and sign actions.
description.ro: List all board members who can sign and execute proposals in a MultiSig wallet. Board members have full voting rights and can both propose and sign actions.
description.it: List all board members who can sign and execute proposals in a MultiSig wallet. Board members have full voting rights and can both propose and sign actions.

info.en: This MultiSig has {{COUNT_NUMBER}} board member(s) who can sign and execute proposals
info.de: Diese MultiSig hat {{COUNT_NUMBER}} Vorstandsmitglied(er), die Vorschläge signieren und ausführen können
